descriptions.text: Darkman is a video game that was developed by Ocean Software (Painting By Numbers on the NES version, Twilight on the Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum versions) and published by Ocean Software in 1991. It was released for the Amiga, ZX Spectrum, Amstrad CPC, Commodore 64 and Atari ST. Darkman had two different games of the same name, one for the Nintendo Entertainment System and the other for Game Boy. The game's plot is loosely based on the film of the same name.

Darkman è un videogioco pubblicato nel 1991 per Amiga, Amstrad CPC, Atari ST, Commodore 64 e ZX Spectrum dalla Ocean Software.
È tratto dal film Darkman del 1990 ed è un misto di picchiaduro a scorrimento e piattaforme, con sottogiochi d'azione di vario genere.
A breve distanza la Ocean pubblicò anche Darkman per NES e Darkman per Game Boy, degli stessi generi ma molto differenti.

ダークマンは、Ocean Softwareによって開発され、1991年にOcean Softwareから発売されたビデオゲームです（NES版は『Painting By Numbers』、Commodore 64およびZX Spectrum版は『Twilight』というタイトルでした）。Amiga、ZX Spectrum、Amstrad CPC、Commodore 64、Atari STといった機種向けにリリースされました。また、ダークマンという名前のゲームは、ニンテンドー・エンターテイメント・システム（NES）用とゲームボーイ用という、2種類の異なるゲームが存在します。ゲームの物語は、同名の映画をモチーフにしています。
